code_fixes.change: run_autonomous_correction_loop now accepts allow_autonomous_profile (default False) and forwards it to every run_candidate_tournament round.

run_s11_production now accepts autonomy_allow_autonomous_profile (default False) and threads it into the authoritative run_candidate_tournament call (the non-gold review-draft convergence tournament stays certificate=None).
New end-to-end proof: OFF -> machine_verified_candidate (population 0); ON + passing governed autonomous-gold cert -> calibrated_auto_accepted -> build_weekly_audit_queue population_count=30.

next_agent_step: Run the multi-provider autonomous tournament in the GPU container on gold-volume sources to emit machine_verified_candidate sidecars under runs/, assemble a frozen image-disjoint corpus, mint a governed autonomous-gold certificate via tools/build_autonomous_gold_admission.py --corpus, place it at the scoped certificate root, then run s11 with autonomy_allow_autonomous_profile=True to populate the audit queue on the now-unblocked path.
root_cause: population_count=0 is the honest downstream symptom of zero certified gold. Independently, the autonomous-certified-gold authority (approved, default-OFF) was NOT reachable on the measured runtime path: run_autonomous_correction_loop dropped the allow_autonomous_profile flag and run_s11_production never forwarded it to run_candidate_tournament. A governed autonomous-gold certificate could therefore never raise a decision to calibrated_auto_accepted, so the audit queue could never see a population even once real gold/certs exist.

serve_mode_b.champion_discovery: create_production_runtime resolves champions via champion_status(); configures sequential predictor only when all champion_* roles are present; honest 503 (AWAITING_RUNTIME) when absent.

stream: certified_gold -> P5 entry -> shadow tournament -> champion promotion -> Mode B /predict
